# Imgur Image Upload

This example demonstrates uploading images to Imgur using propact's universal markdown transport.

## Content

![meme.png](meme.png)

```json
{
  "title": "Propact Meme Generator",
  "description": "Generated by Propact MD universal transport",
  "type": "image",
  "name": "propact-meme"
}
```

## Expected Output

The response will include:
- Uploaded image URL
- Delete hash for removal
- Image ID and metadata

## Run Command

```bash
propact README.md \
  --endpoint "https://api.imgur.com/3/image" \
  --header "Authorization: Client-ID $IMGUR_CLIENT_ID"
```

## Environment Variables

```bash
IMGUR_CLIENT_ID=<YOUR_IMGUR_CLIENT_ID>
```

## Requirements

- Imgur application registered at https://api.imgur.com/oauth2/addclient
- Client ID from your Imgur application
- Image file (meme.png) in the same directory
